name: Patient With Pending Lab Results
description: Patient discharged with multiple pending critical laboratory results. System must flag all pending results, assess clinical significance, and require review before allowing summary generation.

admission.chief_complaint: Fever, night sweats, unexplained weight loss

pending_results.description: Bone marrow biopsy — PENDING pathology review
pending_results.clinical_significance: CRITICAL — determines lymphoma diagnosis and staging
HIGH — lymphoma subtyping for treatment selection

pending_results.description: CT Chest/Abdomen/Pelvis with contrast — PENDING radiology read

clinical_context.hospital_course: 74-year-old male admitted with constitutional symptoms and elevated WBC. Extensive lymphoma workup initiated. Patient tolerated admission well. Oral steroids started empirically for presumed lymphoma-related symptoms.
follow_up: Hematology/Oncology in 3 days to review biopsy results
Call immediately if fever >38.5°C or worsening symptoms

test_purpose: Validates that the system detects ALL pending results, correctly assesses their clinical significance, includes them in the summary's pending section, and requires clinician review before generating the final summary.
